top_amenity_gaps: Outdoor spaces or garden to enhance the living experience
Entertainment options such as a TV or music facilities
analysis.photo_order_rec: Consider featuring the interior/exterior shots of the living room as the lead photo to showcase the property's best features and set the tone for guests.
key_diagnosis: Your £829 nightly rate is an eye-watering 374% higher than the cohort median of £175, indicating a significant opportunity to adjust your pricing strategy while maintaining competitiveness.
Your occupancy rate of 76.1% is lower than the cohort median of 28.3%, suggesting guests are deterred by your pricing, which may need to be re-evaluated to drive more bookings.
With 0 years of hosting experience and a guest rating of None, prioritizing communication, prompt responses, and exceptional hosts may be crucial to boosting credibility and driving more bookings.
analysis.outreach_hook: Your occupancy rate of 76.1% pales against the cohort average of 28.3%, leaving £2,144 (829 x 22 nights) on the table this season.
